svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="11W 攻击绕过缓存" id="jdBypass"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-134" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="11W 攻击流量：每层缓存都「未命中放行」，全部压到后端连接池" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="480" x="220" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NORMAL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="10W 正常流量
命中率 95%+
CDN/WAF/Nginx/Redis 层层消化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ATTACK" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="1W 攻击流量
命中率 ≈ 0
构造的不存在 key，每层都 miss" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TOTAL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="11W 总流量
10W 被缓存消化
1W 全部回源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="600" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="6 层缓存的「未命中放行」逻辑，对攻击反而是帮倒忙" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="440" x="240" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;" value="① CDN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;" value="② WAF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="180" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;" value="③ Nginx" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="320" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;" value="④ SSR 本地 LRU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="460" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;" value="⑤ Node BFF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="600" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=10;" value="⑥ Redis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="100" x="740" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MISS" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="攻击流量：每层都判定「我这没缓存」→ 放行 → 一路畅通打到底" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="520" x="200" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="后端连接池打满（100%）
Socket 耗尽，P99 80ms → 800ms
服务响应缓慢" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="300" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EBE" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="252" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="268" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RECOVER" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="恢复：WAF 清洗（IP 频次 / UA / 请求模式）+ 限流 → 等 Socket 释放
（若有熔断，OPEN 快速失败会比等释放更快恢复）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="480" x="220" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="缓存架构扛效率，WAF 清洗 + 限流扛安全 —— 这两层缺一个，大促都可能翻车" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="640" x="140" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 11W 攻击流量：每层缓存都「未命中放行」，全部压到后端连接池

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 76px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:

命中率 95%+
CDN/WAF/Nginx/Redis 层层消化

后端连接池打满（100%）
Socket 耗尽，P99 80ms → 800ms
服务响应缓慢

div.div:
恢复：WAF 清洗（IP 频次 / UA / 请求模式）+ 限流 → 等 Socket 释放
（若有熔断，OPEN 快速失败会比等释放更快恢复）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 418px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2563eb;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2563eb, #699eff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 缓存架构扛效率，WAF 清洗 + 限流扛安全 —— 这两层缺一个，大促都可能翻车
